message:
feat(health): dependency-aware tool health diagnostics

Add computeHealthDiagnostics() service that builds dependency graphs from
tool definitions' `depends` field, traces root cause chains for cascade
failures, and integrates into /health/detailed endpoint. Includes 8 unit
tests covering cascade detection, deep root causes, and reverse mappings.

Closes bd-2gkx.3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
